concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types once for all focused View enforcement bundles.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments WITH type, sourceFileName, segments, CASE WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Contribution.java' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Binder.java' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION_MODEL' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java' THEN 'CONTENT_MODEL' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'INTENT_HANDLER' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'InspectorEntry.java' THEN 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' THEN 'LEGACY_VIEW_MODEL' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Projector.java' THEN 'PROJECTOR' WHEN sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS viewRole, CASE WHEN size(segments) = 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN 'ACTIVE_ROOT' WHEN size(segments) = 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] IN ['controls', 'main', 'state', 'details', 'topbar', 'primitives'] THEN 'REUSABLE_SLOTCONTENT' ELSE 'NONE' END AS viewUnitKind WITH type, sourceFileName, segments, viewRole, viewUnitKind, CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END AS relativePath, CASE WHEN viewUnitKind = 'ACTIVE_ROOT' AND viewRole IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'CONTRIBUTION_MODEL', 'INTENT_HANDLER', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT', 'VIEW'] THEN true WHEN viewUnitKind = 'REUSABLE_SLOTCONTENT' AND viewRole IN ['CONTENT_MODEL', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT', 'VIEW'] THEN true ELSE false END AS recognizedViewSource SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType, type.viewRole = viewRole, type.viewUnitKind = viewUnitKind, type.recognizedViewSource = recognizedViewSource, type.knownForbiddenRole = CASE WHEN viewRole IN ['PUBLISHED_EVENT', 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY', 'LEGACY_VIEW_MODEL', 'PROJECTOR'] THEN true ELSE false END, type.unknownRoleForm = CASE WHEN viewRole = 'UNKNOWN' THEN true ELSE false END, type.wrongDepth = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 3 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND size(segments) <> 5 THEN true WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] IN ['controls', 'main', 'state', 'details', 'topbar', 'primitives'] AND size(segments) <> 6 THEN true ELSE false END, type.wrongDirectory = CASE WHEN viewUnitKind <> 'NONE' THEN false WHEN size(segments) >= 3 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] THEN false WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[3] IN ['controls', 'main', 'state', 'details', 'topbar', 'primitives'] THEN false ELSE true END, type.sameRootKey = CASE WHEN viewUnitKind = 'ACTIVE_ROOT' THEN segments[2] + '/' + segments[3] WHEN viewUnitKind = 'REUSABLE_SLOTCONTENT' THEN 'slotcontent/' + segments[3] + '/' + segments[4] ELSE '' END, type.sameUnitKey = CASE WHEN viewUnitKind = 'ACTIVE_ROOT' THEN segments[2] + '/' + segments[3] WHEN viewUnitKind = 'REUSABLE_SLOTCONTENT' THEN 'slotcontent/' + segments[3] + '/' + segments[4] ELSE '' END, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN viewRole = 'CONTRIBUTION' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN viewRole = 'BINDER' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN viewRole IN ['CONTRIBUTION_MODEL', 'CONTENT_MODEL', 'LEGACY_VIEW_MODEL'] THEN 'MODEL' WHEN viewRole = 'INTENT_HANDLER' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN viewRole = 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN viewRole = 'VIEW' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = relativePath RETURN type AS ViewLayerType
